transcript: Speaker A: हॅलो, डिस्टर्ब नाही ना केलं? [Hello, did I disturb you?] Speaker B: अरे नाही नाही. मी पण कोणाशी बोलायचं म्हणूनच ऑनलाईन आलो होतो. [Oh no, no. I also came online to talk to someone.] Speaker A: सेम. सुरुवातीला काय बोलायचं हेच कळत नव्हतं. [Same. Initially, I didn't know what to say.] Speaker B: हो ना. मी तर पहिल्या दिवशी फक्त हॅलो बोलून सायलेंट बसलो होतो. पण आता इंग्लिश बरी होतेय. आय एम गेटिंग मोर कॉन्फिडेंट. [Yeah. On the first day, I just said hello and sat silently. But now my English is getting better. I am getting more confident.] Speaker A: अरे वा! मस्त इंग्लिश बोलायला लागलायस. [Oh wow! You've started speaking great English.] Speaker C: MySivi ॲपवर १ कोटी लोकं स्पोकन इंग्लिशची प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. तुम्ही पण आजच सुरू करा. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयात. [Over 1 crore people are practicing spoken English on the MySivi app. You too start today. Trial for just 1 rupee.]
on_screen_text: Be polite and respect the other person's opinion. Avoid rude comments. Tara, Rajat. practices for an average of 6 minutes/call. 28:13 minutes remaining for today's call. Call may be recorded to ensure a quality experience. Mute, Speaker, End. MySivi. Start English Learning - MySivi. 10M+ Downloads. Install. MySivi Premium. LIMITED TIME OFFER. ₹1. Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today. 24/7 AI English Teacher, 500+ Exercises and Lessons, Unlimited Access.
summary: The ad features a simulated conversation between two Marathi speakers practicing English on the MySivi app, highlighting their growth in confidence. It concludes with a voiceover promoting the app's 10M+ user base and a limited-time trial offer for just ₹1.
